name: buildershq
description: Track your developer presence across workspaces. Reports your active, idle, or away status — including Claude Code and git activity — to buildershq.net or a self-hosted server.

buildershq.serverUrl.description: URL of the BuildersHQ presence API endpoint.

buildershq.idleAfterSeconds.description: Seconds of inactivity before status becomes idle.

buildershq.awayAfterSeconds.description: Seconds of inactivity before status becomes away.

buildershq.heartbeatActiveSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to send heartbeats while active.

buildershq.heartbeatIdleSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to send heartbeats while idle.

buildershq.gitCommits.enabled.description: Track git commits as developer activity.

buildershq.githubPr.enabled.description: Track GitHub pull request events (opened/merged) via the GitHub API.

buildershq.claudeCode.enabled.description: Enable Claude Code activity tracking (watches JSONL transcript files).

buildershq.claudeCode.transcriptPath.description: Override path to Claude Code transcript directory. Leave empty for auto-detection.

buildershq.codex.enabled.description: Enable OpenAI Codex activity tracking (watches JSONL session files).

buildershq.codex.transcriptPath.description: Override path to OpenAI Codex sessions directory. Leave empty for auto-detection (~/.codex/sessions).

buildershq.opencode.transcriptPath.description: Override path to Opencode storage directory. Leave empty for auto-detection (~/.local/share/opencode/storage).

buildershq.gemini.transcriptPath.description: Override path to Gemini CLI chats directory. Leave empty for auto-detection (~/.gemini/chats).

buildershq.aider.transcriptPath.description: Override path to Aider chat history file. Leave empty for auto-detection (.aider.chat.history.md in workspace root).

buildershq.sharedEnvFilePath.description: Optional path to a .env file supplying PRESENCE_SERVER_URL, GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET, and MONGODB_URI. PRESENCE_SERVER_URL overrides the serverUrl setting. Leave empty to skip.

buildershq.debugLogging.description: Ship debug logs to the server for pipeline diagnostics. Enable when debugging event delivery issues.

scripts.package: npm run version:bump && npm run check-types && node esbuild.js --production
